decisions.summary: Added killAllReviewSessions() to kill all review-related tmux sessions (coordinators, canonical reviewers, legacy reviewers) — called from pan down to prevent stale sessions surviving dashboard restart.

Enhanced dispatchParallelReview idempotency guard with isCoordinatorAliveAsync() that checks #{pane_pid} process existence via kill -0. Catches zombies where pane_dead=0 but underlying bash process has exited.
Wired killAllReviewSessions into pan down command in src/cli/index.ts, positioned after dashboard stop and before Traefik stop.

hazards.summary: process.kill(pid, 0) is sync but extremely fast (single syscall). Used only in review-agent code, not dashboard server routes.
hazards.mitigation: Acceptable per CLAUDE.md: CLI-side sync calls are fine.

resumePoint.description: Bead workspace-sfog is complete. Next: bead workspace-yzs6 — add tests for killAllReviewSessions, isCoordinatorAliveAsync, and pan down integration.

sessionHistory.note: Completed bead workspace-etvu: added killAllReviewSessions function and enhanced idempotency guard in review-agent.ts. All 81 existing tests pass.
Completed bead workspace-sfog: wired killAllReviewSessions into pan down command in src/cli/index.ts.
